sections.paragraph:
verb לחזוק

be strong, firm; courageous; defeat

verb לחזק

to strengthen; fortify, reinforce

verb חוזק (>>חֻזַּק)

be fortified, reinforced; strengthened

verb להתחזק

to gather strength; recover; establish

verb להחזיק

to hold; keep; grip; cling to; contain; own

verb הוחזק

be held; kept; gripped; clung to; owned by

verb לחזק (>>חיזק)

to strengthen; fortify, reinforce

adverb

strong, powerful, robust, burly, vigorous, fast, firm, forceful, forcible, forte, hardy, hearty, hefty, husky, intense, living, masculine, massive, mighty, muscular, orotund, overpowering, poten

adjective

strong, powerful, robust, burly, vigorous, fast, firm, forceful, forcible, forte, hardy, hearty, hefty, husky, intense, living, masculine, massive, mighty, muscular, orotund, overpowering, poten
